about.description: A desktop client for SSH-centric operations and mixed terminal workflows.

activeSessions.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, type, or session ID...

ai.agentMaxStepsDesc: Maximum steps in the ReAct loop for Agent mode.
ai.autoExecutionConfirmDesc: Auto mode allows every command returned by Agent mode. Confirm that you trust the current model, context, and target terminal.
ai.backgroundAgentExecutionDesc: Run commands as background tasks and return results to the current AI chat.
ai.clearHistoryDesc: This deletes all AI conversation history and cancels active AI requests. This action cannot be undone.
ai.empty: Ask AI to explain output or generate commands.
ai.enableOneModelHint: Enable at least one model before using the AI panel.
ai.executionModeSmartDesc: Auto-run low-risk commands and confirm higher-risk ones.
ai.manualModelNoProvider: Enable an API key profile before adding a model manually.
ai.maxAiFileSize: Max file size for file AI actions
ai.maxAiFileSizeDesc: Hide file AI actions when the selected file exceeds this size.
ai.modelListDesc: Refresh pulls known models from rust-genai. New models are disabled by default.
ai.noCredentials: Add an API key credential first
ai.noEnabledModels: No enabled models. Enable one under AI > Models.
ai.noModels: No models yet. Please enable a provider or refresh the model list.
ai.repairSelected: AI generate a fix command from selection
ai.requestUserAgentDesc: User-Agent header sent with AI provider requests.
ai.smartAutoExecuteMaxRiskDesc: Commands auto-run when the locally reviewed risk is at or below this level. Critical always requires confirmation.
ai.terminalOutputLinesDesc: Lines shown in terminal when AI Agent runs a command. Set 0 to hide inline output.
ai.title: AI

dialog.algorithmModeCompatibleDesc: Best for most servers. Newer secure algorithms are tried first, with compatibility fallbacks for older devices.
dialog.algorithmModeCustomDesc: Choose key exchange, cipher, MAC, and host key algorithms, then adjust their priority.
dialog.algorithmModeSecureDesc: Only enables stricter modern algorithms, best for newer servers and higher-security environments.
dialog.askPasswordDescription: Do not store a password now. NyaTerm will ask when this connection starts.
dialog.baudRateInvalid: Baud rate must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
dialog.confirmCloseDesc: Active sessions will be disconnected. Quit?
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Web server for project X
dialog.noAuthenticationDescription: Connect without password or key. Use only when the SSH server allows it or asks interactively.
dialog.postLoginCommandDesc: Automatically send commands after SSH login and Shell startup
dialog.postLoginDelayInvalid: Delay must be between {{min}} and {{max}} ms
dialog.sftpAdvancedDesc: Controls the SSH file browser and how terminal directories are tracked.
dialog.sftpCwdFollowOffDesc: Do not install shell hooks or follow the terminal directory.
dialog.sftpCwdFollowRcFileDesc: Install a managed NyaTerm block and reusable script on the remote host, then activate it for this session.
dialog.sftpCwdFollowShellIntegrationDesc: Use the current temporary shell hook. Nothing is written to the remote host.
dialog.sshAlgorithmsDesc: Controls transport negotiation order for this SSH connection.
dialog.sshBackspaceModeDesc: Controls the byte sent by Backspace in SSH sessions. Switch to Ctrl+H for network devices that do not accept the default DEL key.
dialog.telnetForceCharAtATimeDesc: Write each input character to the TCP stream immediately.
dialog.telnetLocalEchoDesc: Show typed input locally when the device does not echo.
dialog.telnetLocalLineEdit: Local line editing / Send line on Enter
dialog.telnetLocalLineEditDesc: Edit input locally and send the full command when Enter is pressed. Useful for debug ports that do not support remote Backspace.
dialog.telnetNoAuthenticationDescription: Connect without sending a saved Telnet password automatically.
dialog.telnetRawTcpCli: Embedded debug port / Raw TCP CLI
dialog.telnetRawTcpCliDesc: Suitable for non-standard Telnet, embedded debug ports, and device CLIs. When enabled, Telnet negotiation is disabled and input is passed through directly.
dialog.telnetRawTcpCliLongDesc: Disables Telnet negotiation and passes input directly through for TVs, routers, switches, and embedded debug ports.
dialog.telnetSendNawsDesc: Send terminal size changes in standard Telnet mode.
dialog.telnetSendSgaDesc: Accept Suppress Go Ahead negotiation in standard Telnet mode.
dialog.x11ForwardingDesc: Allow remote graphical applications to display on your local X server through SSH.

dockerManager.noSession: Connect via SSH to manage Docker
dockerManager.pruneDesc: Remove unused Docker data, including volumes?
dockerManager.unavailable: Docker is not available on this SSH host

dockerSudo.description: "{{name}}" needs sudo to access the Docker socket.
dockerSudo.hint: The password is sent to sudo over stdin and cached only for this SSH session.
dockerSudo.title: Docker sudo required

fileEditor.conflictDesc: The remote file changed after you opened it. Reload to keep the remote version, or force save to overwrite it.
fileEditor.openExternalTooltip: Download to a temporary folder and open with your external editor. Saved changes can sync back to the remote file.
fileEditor.reloadDirtyDesc: Reloading reads the remote file again and discards the unsaved changes in this editor.
fileEditor.title: File Editor
fileEditor.unsavedFilesDesc: There are {{count}} files with unsaved changes.

fileExplorer.applyRecursively: Apply to this folder and all subfolders/files
fileExplorer.binaryOpenExternal: Binary files open with the external editor.
fileExplorer.deleteConfirmHint: Press Enter to confirm, or click Delete.
fileExplorer.externalDropOverlayHint: Files and folders will be uploaded via SFTP
fileExplorer.externalDropPathsRequired: No local paths from this drag source. Use Upload Files or Upload Folder.
fileExplorer.externalDropTimeout: Windows did not provide local paths. Use Upload Files or Upload Folder.
fileExplorer.name: Name
fileExplorer.openInternalFailed: Failed to open the built-in editor.
fileExplorer.ownerGroupRequired: Owner and group cannot be empty.
fileExplorer.remoteBrowserDisabledDesc: Enable SFTP in this SSH connection's advanced settings to browse files.
fileExplorer.unknownFileTypeDesc: "{{name}}" is not in the known text or binary file list. Choose how to open it.
fileExplorer.unsupportedSessionDesc: Switch to an SSH tab to browse files.

fileTransfer.duplicateDescription: A {{kind}} named "{{name}}" already exists at the destination. Choose how to proceed.
fileTransfer.duplicateOverwriteAllForTaskDesc: Only for this upload task; future uploads will still ask.

gpuMonitor.error: Failed to fetch NVIDIA GPU data
gpuMonitor.noGpus: No NVIDIA GPUs reported by this host
gpuMonitor.noSession: Connect via SSH to monitor NVIDIA GPUs
gpuMonitor.unavailable: NVIDIA GPU monitoring is not available on this SSH host

network.bindAddressHint: Choose whether the port is local-only or reachable by other hosts.
network.bindAllInterfacesHint: Listen on 0.0.0.0 so other hosts can reach it.
network.bindLocalhostOnlyHint: Listen only on 127.0.0.1. Safer by default.
network.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and its {{count}} item(s)? This cannot be undone.
network.groupDialogDescription: Use groups to organize proxies and tunnels in the network panel.
network.listenPortDynamicHint: Exposes a SOCKS5 proxy on this device.
network.listenPortLocalHint: Listens locally and forwards to a remote service.
network.listenPortRemoteHint: Listens on the remote host and forwards back locally.
network.noConnectionsHint: Create a connection first, then add tunnels.
network.proxyCommandHint: Placeholders: %h target host, %p target port, %r username, %% percent sign.
network.proxyDialogDescription: Configure a reusable proxy for saved connections.
network.proxyEmptyHint: Create a proxy, then assign it in connection settings.
network.proxyPortRequired: Please enter a valid proxy port.
network.searchProxies: Search proxy, protocol, host, or command...
network.targetHostLocalHint: Remote service address to reach through SSH.
network.targetHostRemoteHint: Local service address to forward remote traffic to.
network.targetPortLocalHint: Port used by the remote target service.
network.targetPortRemoteHint: Port used by the local service.
network.tunnelDialogDescription: Create an SSH tunnel through a saved connection.
network.tunnelEmptyHint: Create local, remote, or dynamic forwarding.
network.tunnelNamePlaceholder: e.g. Local port for web server
network.tunnelSectionDescription: Manage port forwarding for a connection.

otp.hotpHint: Generate on demand. The counter advances each time.
otp.title: Authentication Prompt

otpManager.sendToTerminalFailed: Failed to send code to terminal
otpManager.title: OTP

panel.resourceMonitorDisabled: Enable remote resource stats in Settings
panel.resourceMonitorNoSession: Connect via SSH to view resources

processManager.invalidNice: Nice value must be an integer from -20 to 19.
processManager.noSession: Connect via SSH to manage processes
processManager.unsupported: Process listing is not supported on this remote host

quickCommands.appendHint: Place command at the prompt for review.
quickCommands.deleteConfirm: Delete quick command '{{name}}'? This can't be undone.
quickCommands.importMergeHint: Import merges by ID and keeps existing commands.
quickCommands.label: Label

savedConnections.clearAllConfirm: Clear all connections and folders? This can't be undone.
savedConnections.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected connections? This can't be undone.
savedConnections.importMergeHint: Session import merges into existing connections and keeps the current list.

secretUnlock.lockedActionHint: Unlock via the bottom bar first
secretUnlock.lockedDesc: Verify master password to view, edit, and delete entries.
secretUnlock.unlockedDesc: Plaintext is visible while this panel is open.

serialSend.hexError: Invalid hex input. Use hex characters (0-9, A-F) separated by spaces.
serialSend.hexInvalidPreview: Fix invalid bytes to preview data.
serialSend.sendPartial: Some sessions did not receive the data
serialSend.serialUnavailable: Serial send needs the active serial session
serialSend.serialUnavailableDesc: Switch to a serial tab to send text or hex data here.
serialSend.shellPlaceholder:
Enter text to send...
Ctrl/Cmd + Enter to send
serialSend.shellSendPartial: Some windows did not receive the command
serialSend.shellUnavailableDesc: None of the active windows currently contain SSH, local terminal, or Telnet sessions.
serialSend.title: Command Send
serialSend.unavailableDesc: Switch to a connected serial, SSH, local terminal, or Telnet tab to send data.

sessionQuickSwitcher.noMatches: No sessions or saved connections matched your search
sessionQuickSwitcher.noSessions: No open sessions or saved connections
sessionQuickSwitcher.title: Command Palette

settings.actionLinksDesc: Recognize patterns (IP, archive, host:port, path) in terminal output. Ctrl/Cmd+Click to insert the default command. Alt+Click to show all actions.
settings.aliyunDriveClientIdDesc: OAuth client ID used with AliyunDrive refresh token.
settings.aliyunDriveRefreshTokenDesc: Long-lived AliyunDrive refresh token used by OpenDAL to refresh access.
settings.aliyunDriveTypeDesc: Usually resource. Use backup when your AliyunDrive app is configured for backup drive access.
settings.allowOsc52ClipboardWriteDesc: Allow terminal output from remote apps to write to the local clipboard.
settings.altAsMetaDesc: On macOS, send ESC + key for Option shortcuts like Option+f instead of entering special characters such as ƒ.
settings.askSaveLocationDesc: Ask where to save before each download.
settings.autoCheckOnStartupDesc: Compare local and latest cloud snapshots on startup.
settings.autoPushOnChangeDesc: Upload a new encrypted sync snapshot after local configuration changes settle.
settings.autoSyncStrategyDesc: Control startup checks and debounced auto-push after local data changes are saved.
settings.backgroundContentOpacityDesc: Lower values reveal more of the image. {{value}} is a balanced default.
settings.backgroundImageDesc: Use a local image behind the main window while keeping settings and child windows solid.
settings.backgroundImageFitDesc: How the image fills the main window.
settings.backgroundImageOpacityDesc: How strongly the background shows through.
settings.commandSuggestionsDesc: Show suggestions from history and built-in commands.
settings.commandSuggestionsMaxCharsDesc: Only include history entries whose command length does not exceed this limit. Quick commands are unaffected.
settings.commandSuggestionsMinCharsDesc: Only include history entries whose command length is at least this limit. Quick commands are unaffected.
settings.confirmOnCloseDesc: Confirm before closing with active sessions.
settings.copyOnSelectDesc: Copy selected terminal text to clipboard.
settings.dataManagementDesc: Import or export all application configuration data. Exported files are encrypted with the master password.
settings.defaultEditorDesc: Program for opening remote files locally. Empty uses system default.
settings.defaultFilePermissionsDesc: Octal permission mode for uploaded files (e.g. 644).
settings.defaultShellDesc: Shell used for new local terminals.
settings.deleteKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete key '{{name}}'?
settings.deviceNameDesc: Used in snapshot metadata so you can identify which device uploaded it.
settings.diagnosticsDesc: Manage local structured diagnostic logs for troubleshooting and support.
settings.dockerManagerIntervalDesc: How often to fetch Docker objects. Default: 10s.
settings.downloadConcurrentTasksDesc: Downloads that can run at once (1-10).
settings.downloadPathDesc: Default download folder. Empty uses system Downloads.
settings.driveAccessTokenDesc: Optional short-lived OAuth access token. Refresh token is recommended for long-term sync.
settings.duplicateSessionCommandDelayDesc: Default delay before running a command in a duplicated session. You can override it in the command dialog.
settings.duplicateStrategyDesc: What to do when the target file already exists.
settings.editorTypeDesc: Choose how remote files open from the file explorer.
settings.enableCloudSyncDesc: Allow this device to push, pull, and check the encrypted cloud sync snapshot.
settings.enableScreenLockDesc: Lock on startup or after inactivity.
settings.engineUrlHint: Must include %s to represent the search term.
settings.engineUrlInvalid: This template is missing %s, so the query cannot be injected.
settings.exportConfigDesc: Compress and encrypt all config files into a .nya file.
settings.exportDiagnosticsDesc: Export recent logs, a runtime summary, and a manifest for troubleshooting.
settings.fontFamilyDesc: The font family used in the terminal and app UI. Topmost font has highest priority.
settings.giteeSnippetAccessTokenDesc: Personal access token with permission to read and update the selected Gitee code snippet.
settings.giteeSnippetApiEndpointDesc: Use the default endpoint unless you are connecting to a Gitee-compatible deployment.
settings.giteeSnippetIdDesc: Use an existing private Gitee code snippet ID. NyaTerm stores sync objects as files in this snippet.
settings.githubGistAuthDesc: Connect GitHub with device flow. NyaTerm will create a private gist when no gist ID is provided.
settings.githubGistClientIdMissing: This build is missing the GitHub OAuth Client ID. Rebuild NyaTerm with NYATERM_GITHUB_GIST_CLIENT_ID configured.
settings.githubGistIdDesc: Leave empty to let NyaTerm create a private gist during GitHub authorization.
settings.githubGistRequired: GitHub Gist ID is required. Connect GitHub to create one automatically.
settings.githubGistSlowDown: GitHub asked NyaTerm to slow down authorization polling.
settings.globalShortcutsDesc: Global hotkeys available throughout the application.
settings.googleDriveClientIdDesc: OAuth client ID from your Google Cloud application.
settings.googleDriveRefreshTokenDesc: Long-lived Google Drive refresh token with Drive file access.
settings.gpuMonitorIntervalDesc: How often to fetch NVIDIA GPU metrics. Default: 3s.
settings.hardwareAccelerationDesc: Use GPU for terminal rendering (WebGL/Canvas). Requires restart.
settings.hostKeyPolicyDesc: How to handle unknown SSH host keys during connection.
settings.hostKeyVerifyChanged: The host key for this server has changed since the last connection.
settings.hostKeyVerifyNew: New host. Verify the key fingerprint below.
settings.hostKeyVerifyWarning: WARNING: Host key changed. This may be an attack or server reinstall. Accept only if trusted.
settings.idleLockMinutesDesc: Automatically lock the application after X minutes of inactivity. 0 to disable.
settings.importConfigDesc: Restore all configuration from a .nya backup file. Requires app restart.
settings.interactionClipboardMouseDesc: Configure terminal selection, paste, and basic mouse behavior.
settings.interactionCommandInputDesc: Configure command suggestions, history candidates, and terminal word boundaries.
settings.interactionEncodingDesc: Configure the default character encoding for terminal streams.
settings.interactionTerminalPageDesc: Configure terminal page controls and viewport behavior.
settings.keepAliveIntervalDesc: Send SSH keep-alive packets every X seconds. 0 to disable.
settings.keywordHighlightBuiltinNote: Can be toggled individually and adapt to the current theme. Your custom rules override these.
settings.keywordHighlightImportDesc: Import custom highlight rules from a NyaTerm JSON file.
settings.keywordHighlightImportMergeHint: Rules with the same id are updated; new ids are appended.
settings.keywordHighlightNoRules: No custom rules yet. Click + to add one.
settings.keywordHighlightWrappedLinesDesc: Treat soft-wrapped lines as one logical line. May affect performance.
settings.keywordHighlightingDesc: Overlay colors on matching text. Enabled built-in rules apply; your rules take priority.
settings.keywordHighlightingExperimentalDesc: Overlay colors on matching text. Enabled built-in rules apply; your rules take priority. This is an unfinished experimental feature, please enable with caution.
settings.logRetentionDesc: Old logs beyond this window are removed.
settings.macImeCompatibilityDesc: Fixes dropped characters when typing quickly with some macOS IMEs in English mode. Enable only if you experience missing keystrokes.
settings.masterPasswordDesc: Encrypt sensitive data and protect the lock screen.
settings.masterPasswordEmptyDesc: Enter a master password or turn it off before saving.
settings.masterPasswordLockedByCloudSync: Cloud sync is using the master password. Turn off cloud sync before disabling it.
settings.masterPasswordRequiredDesc: Please set a master password in Security settings before performing this operation.
settings.masterPasswordSwitchDesc: Protects the lock screen and local secrets. It must stay enabled while cloud sync is enabled.
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep running in the background when closed.
settings.minimumContrastRatioDesc: Automatically adjusts terminal foreground colors when output is too close to the background.
settings.noSyncHistoryMatchFilters: No cloud sync records match the current filters.
settings.onedriveClientIdDesc: OAuth client ID from your Microsoft app registration.
settings.onedriveRefreshTokenDesc: Long-lived OneDrive refresh token. Include offline_access when generating it.
settings.openLogsDesc: Open the local log folder in your system file manager.
settings.panelMultiOpenDesc: When enabled, clicking activity bar icons on either side can open multiple panels at once.
settings.processManagerIntervalDesc: How often to fetch the remote process list. Default: 5s.
settings.providerRootDesc: Optional provider-specific root path before NyaTerm's namespace prefix is applied.
settings.recordingAutoStartDesc: Automatically start writing a recording file after each session starts. Recording files keep growing until the session ends or recording is stopped manually.
settings.recordingIncludeIoLabelsDesc: Include INPUT and OUTPUT markers in recording and saved session text files.
settings.recordingIncludeTimestampsDesc: Include timestamps for each record in recording and saved session text files.
settings.recordingMemoryLimitDesc: Max transcript text kept per session.
settings.recordingPathDesc: Folder for recordings. Empty uses Downloads.
settings.recordingSettingsDesc: Configure recording files and saved session text output.
settings.remoteNamespaceDesc: Top-level path prefix for NyaTerm snapshots inside the selected provider.
settings.remoteStatsIntervalDesc: How often to fetch remote resource usage. Default: 3s.
settings.resumeBrokenTransferDesc: Resume incomplete transfers instead of restarting.
settings.rightClickPasteDesc: Paste clipboard text on terminal right-click.
settings.s3CredentialsIncomplete: Access Key ID and Secret Access Key must both be set together.
settings.s3VirtualHostStyleDesc: Enable virtual-hosted-style requests when required by your S3-compatible provider.
settings.scrollbackLinesDesc: Number of lines kept in memory for scrolling up.

shortcutLabels.multiplexSshWithCommand: Reuse SSH Connection and Run Command

settings.showDockerManagerDesc: Show and manage Docker on the active SSH host.
settings.showGpuMonitorDesc: Show NVIDIA GPU metrics on the active SSH host.
settings.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers in the terminal gutter.
settings.showProcessManagerDesc: Show and manage processes on the active SSH host.
settings.showRemoteStatsDesc: Show active SSH host resource usage.
settings.showTimestampsDesc: Show output time in the terminal gutter.
settings.showWorkspacePaddingDesc: Add a little blank space on the left side of terminal content.
settings.startupRestoreDesc: Reopen terminal sessions active before last close.
settings.startupRestoreWindowLayoutDesc: Restore the left/right or top/bottom tab windows from the last close.
settings.syncConflictSectionDesc: Resolve cases where local and cloud snapshots changed independently.
settings.syncDebounceSecondsDesc: Wait this long after the latest local change before uploading a sync snapshot.
settings.syncMasterPasswordMissingDesc: Set a master password first. Cloud sync stays disabled until one is configured.
settings.syncMasterPasswordReadyDesc: Cloud sync uses your master password to encrypt the remote snapshot.
settings.syncProviderConfigDesc: Configure the remote storage used by cloud sync.
settings.syncProviderDesc: Choose which remote storage backend OpenDAL should use.
settings.tabDoubleClickActionDesc: Shortcut action to run when double-clicking a session tab.
settings.tabMiddleClickActionDesc: Shortcut action to run when middle-clicking a session tab.
settings.tabMouseActionsDesc: Configure shortcut actions for double-click, middle-click, and right-click on session tabs. Right-click opens the original tab menu when set to No Action.
settings.tabRightClickActionDesc: Shortcut action to run when right-clicking a session tab. Set to No Action to open the tab menu.
settings.targetLanguageDesc: Translate selected text into this language.
settings.terminalFontFamilyDesc: Monospace fonts for terminal sessions. Top font has priority.
settings.terminalFontWeightBoldDesc: Weight used when terminal output requests bold text.
settings.terminalFontWeightDesc: Weight used for normal terminal text.
settings.terminalThemeDesc: Select the color theme for the terminal. Choose "Follow UI Theme" to use the same theme as the application.
settings.terminalZoomEnabledDesc: Allow terminal zoom from the View menu, zoom shortcuts, and Ctrl/Command + mouse wheel.
settings.title: Settings
settings.transferBufferSizeDesc: Single SFTP request block size in kilobytes. Use 256 KB for LAN transfers.
settings.translationProvidersDesc: Configure API credentials for translation services. Google and Microsoft require no configuration.
settings.uiFontFamilyDesc: The font family used by the application interface. Topmost font has highest priority.
settings.uploadConcurrentTasksDesc: Uploads that can run at once (1-10).
settings.useOsKeyringDesc: Securely store credentials in the system's native keychain (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Secret Service).
settings.windowTransparencyBlurDesc: Adds the system Acrylic blur material behind transparent windows.
settings.wordSeparatorsDesc: Characters that split words on double-click.
settings.x11DisplayDesc: Requires a local X server. Windows can use VcXsrv/Xming, macOS can use XQuartz, and Linux usually uses Xorg/Xwayland.

sshAuth.keyOnlyHint: Runtime authentication can use saved SSH keys only. Import new keys from Security settings.
sshAuth.keyPassphraseRequired: Enter the passphrase for this private key.
sshAuth.keyRejectedFallback: The private key was rejected. Enter a password to continue.
sshAuth.missingPassword: Enter the password for this connection.
sshAuth.noKeys: No saved SSH keys are available.
sshAuth.passwordRejected: The previous password was rejected. Try again.
sshAuth.publickeyRejected: The server rejected the current key. Choose another saved SSH key.
sshAuth.publickeyRequired: The server only allows public key authentication.
sshAuth.title: SSH Authentication

syncGroup.description: Control terminal input broadcast scopes by group and choose the live sessions to sync.
syncGroup.noGroupSelected: Select or create a group to manage session members.
syncGroup.noGroups: No sync groups yet. Create one to synchronize input across sessions.
syncGroup.noSessionMatches: No sessions match the current filters.
syncGroup.searchPlaceholder: Search name, type, host, or session ID...
syncGroup.selectSameHostTooltip: Select all sessions on the same host as the currently selected sessions.
syncGroup.title: Sync Input Groups

tabCtx.lockedCloseBlocked: Unlock this tab before closing it
tabCtx.multiplexSshWithCommand: Reuse SSH Connection and Run Command

temporarySsh.description: Paste or type an SSH target. This opens a direct SSH session without saving it.
temporarySsh.inlinePassword: Inline passwords are not supported. NyaTerm will ask for credentials when needed.
temporarySsh.invalidInput: Enter a valid SSH command, URL, or host.
temporarySsh.missingHost: Enter a host to connect to.
temporarySsh.title: Temporary Link
temporarySsh.unsupportedOption: Temporary links only support direct SSH connections.

terminal.dropFoldersNotSupportedLocal: Folders cannot be inserted as paths in a local terminal.
terminal.dropFoldersZmodemOnly: Folders cannot be uploaded via ZMODEM. Use the file explorer for SFTP uploads.
terminal.dropOverlayHintLocal: File paths will be inserted into the command line
terminal.dropOverlayHintSsh: Single files prefer ZMODEM; folders or failures use SFTP
terminal.dropOverlayTitleSsh: Drop files or folders to upload
terminal.dropPathsRequired: No local paths from this drag source.
terminal.largeOutputProtectionActiveDetail: Rendering is prioritizing responsiveness. Skipped {{skipped}} queued characters.
terminal.largeOutputProtectionRecoveredDetail: The terminal is responsive again. Skipped {{skipped}} queued characters during overload.
terminal.pasteImageAsPath: Paste image or image file as path
terminal.pasteImageAsPathDesc: When pasting a screenshot or copied image file into a local or SSH terminal, insert a readable file path. SSH sessions upload the image first. Useful for CLI tools such as Claude Code and Codex.
terminal.showMultiLinePasteDialogDesc: Show a processing window when pasting multi-line text, with options to paste directly, send line by line, or cancel.

updater.portableManualDesc: Portable edition cannot auto-update. Download the latest zip, close NyaTerm, replace files, and keep your data folder.

zmodem.dragFilesHint: Alternatively, drag files onto the terminal to upload
zmodem.selectFiles: Select files to upload via ZMODEM
zmodem.selectSaveDir: Select folder to save ZMODEM downloads
zmodem.sftpProbeSkipped: SFTP channel busy, skipping conflict detection; uploading via ZMODEM
